premise: Value Zone Accumulation: buy 3-day higher-close accumulation inside the value zone (consecutiveHigherHighsInValueZone) when market breadth is washed out (marketBreadthNearDonchianLow 0.15), earnings-aware. Differentiator vs VCP: mean-reversion-to-trend pullback buy, opposite market timing. KNOWN-WEAKNESS class (dip-toward-EMA in uptrend).

summary: ANTI-PREDICTIVE: meanLift NEGATIVE at all horizons (5d -0.327%/2.76SE, 10d -0.539%/3.61SE, 20d -0.492%/2.65SE), negative hit-rate lift, 42 sig/day across 1347 dates => structural not lumpy. Firing 0.57% (very selective; mild support dip 2008/09/15 ~0.28%). Negligible fill gap => negative number is real. Every sweep cell (consecutiveDays/emaPeriod/atrMultiplier/percentile) uniformly NEGATIVE => no ARS sign-flip to alias on, no passing cell to promote; consecutiveDays makes anti-edge stronger (2d -0.324% -> 4d -0.689% @10d). SPY-regime sign-flip down->up at every horizon (20d down -0.728% -> up +0.193%) AND fires MOST in down-tape (0.80%) where it loses most. Confirms documented VZ3/MR3 dip-toward-EMA failure class.

reason: Differentiator rejected at /condition-screen (design-time). Contrarian 'buy the dip near EMA in washed-out breadth' premise is anti-predictive + regime-sign-flipped. NOT a firewall death — no config_hash marked DEAD, cross-candidate G13 brake NOT engaged.
next: REDESIGN inappropriate: dropping the SPY-down tertile = IS-fitting the gate to this screen's regime split (the exact anti-pattern for this class). If value-zone accumulation is pursued, needs a structurally different trigger (e.g. breadth TURNING UP rather than near Donchian low) as a NEW candidate, re-screened from scratch.
